  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Node.js</a>
- <a href="connect-local-servers.html#understanding-mcp-servers"
  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Understanding
  MCP Servers</a>
- <a href="connect-local-servers.html#installing-the-filesystem-server"
  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Installing
  the Filesystem Server</a>
- <a href="connect-local-servers.html#using-the-filesystem-server"
  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Using
  the Filesystem Server</a>
- <a href="connect-local-servers.html#file-management-examples"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">File Management Examples</a>
- <a href="connect-local-servers.html#how-approval-works"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">How Approval Works</a>

  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Next

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="content-area"
class="relative grow box-border flex-col w-full mx-auto px-1 lg:pl-[23.7rem] lg:-ml-12 xl:w-[calc(100%-28rem)]">

<div id="header" class="relative leading-none">

<div class="mt-0.5 space-y-2.5">

<div class="eyebrow h-5 text-primary dark:text-primary-light text-sm font-semibold">

Develop with MCP

</div>

<div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center relative gap-2 min-w-0">

# Connect to local MCP servers

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] justify-end ml-auto sm:flex hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="mt-2 text-lg prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [&>*]:[overflow-wrap:anywhere]">

Learn how to extend Claude Desktop with local MCP servers to enable file
system access and other powerful integrations

</div>

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="flex items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] mt-3 sm:hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

</div>

</div>

<div id="content"
class="mdx-content @container/columns-container relative mt-8 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate empty:hidden mb-14"
page-title="Connect to local MCP servers"
page-href="/docs/develop/connect-local-servers">

<span data-as="p">Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers extend AI
applications’ capabilities by providing secure, controlled access to
local resources and tools. Many clients support MCP, enabling diverse
integration possibilities across different platforms and
applications.</span> <span data-as="p">This guide demonstrates how to
connect to local MCP servers using Claude Desktop as an example, one of
the <a href="../../clients.html" class="link">many clients that support
MCP</a>. While we focus on Claude Desktop’s implementation, the concepts
apply broadly to other MCP-compatible clients. By the end of this
tutorial, Claude will be able to interact with files on your computer,
create new documents, organize folders, and search through your file
system—all with your explicit permission for each action.</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-filesystem.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=629d7e754dc358d71a408d6ce970c1b1"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:1732 / 2060"
data-path="images/quickstart-filesystem.png" decoding="async"
sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"
srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-filesystem.png?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=0758ee60aee8acc3035727957612351f 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-filesystem.png?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=3bc6d3ea4a3cd38b6d031ac386700c62 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-filesystem.png?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=9d75e8729b08b452f2e0d08bff8ce393 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-filesystem.png?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=b35c6b531daa84b4ba4b06c9223b1ee2 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-filesystem.png?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=c4bb491d17a65e038120b5c39031ab7f 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-filesystem.png?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=ea7a0ad5ae5eeb866222f4020dc7bba3 2500w"
data-optimize="true" width="1732" height="2060"
alt="Claude Desktop with filesystem integration showing file management capabilities" /></span></span>

</div>

<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-black/5 rounded-2xl dark:border-white/5">

</div>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#prerequisites"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Prerequisites</span>

<span data-as="p">Before starting this tutorial, ensure you have the
following installed on your system:</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#claude-desktop"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Claude Desktop</span>

<span data-as="p">Download and install
<a href="https://claude.ai/download" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Claude Desktop</a> for your operating system. Claude
Desktop is available for macOS and Windows.</span> <span data-as="p">If
you already have Claude Desktop installed, verify you’re running the
latest version by clicking the Claude menu and selecting “Check for
Updates…”</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#node-js"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Node.js</span>

<span data-as="p">The Filesystem Server and many other MCP servers
require Node.js to run. Verify your Node.js installation by opening a
terminal or command prompt and running:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
node --version
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">If Node.js is not installed, download it from
<a href="https://nodejs.org/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">nodejs.org</a>. We recommend the LTS (Long Term
Support) version for stability.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#understanding-mcp-servers"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Understanding MCP Servers</span>

<span data-as="p">MCP servers are programs that run on your computer and
provide specific capabilities to Claude Desktop through a standardized
protocol. Each server exposes tools that Claude can use to perform
actions, with your approval. The Filesystem Server we’ll install
provides tools for:</span>

- Reading file contents and directory structures
- Creating new files and directories
- Moving and renaming files
- Searching for files by name or content

<span data-as="p">All actions require your explicit approval before
execution, ensuring you maintain full control over what Claude can
access and modify.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#installing-the-filesystem-server"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Installing the Filesystem Server</span>

<span data-as="p">The process involves configuring Claude Desktop to
automatically start the Filesystem Server whenever you launch the
application. This configuration is done through a JSON file that tells
Claude Desktop which servers to run and how to connect to them.</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

1

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Open Claude Desktop Settings

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Start by accessing the Claude Desktop settings. Click
on the Claude menu in your system’s menu bar (not the settings within
the Claude window itself) and select
“Settings…”</span><span data-as="p">On macOS, this appears in the top
menu bar:</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
style="text-align:center" data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-menu.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=0c8b57e0e17af3624b6762a3ea944c8e"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:644 / 568"
data-path="images/quickstart-menu.png" decoding="async"
sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"
srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-menu.png?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=f997b6f31398840d3a824fa0eb9fec43 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-menu.png?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=062b0b3c342e4e02a8f2d690a48bcb24 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-menu.png?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=ae9b08052b7ea30b31d27432d8edf19e 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-menu.png?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=7962cc4fb841fa0a04a3c6de03cf4d3d 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-menu.png?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=86bd79431e35b133d0ae4f74265f3d60 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-menu.png?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=1b300ae527efb4744aa08d5df94299a0 2500w"
data-optimize="true" width="400"
alt="Claude Desktop menu showing Settings option" /></span></span>

</div>

<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-black/5 rounded-2xl dark:border-white/5">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">This opens the Claude Desktop configuration window,
which is separate from your Claude account settings.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

2

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Access Developer Settings

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">In the Settings window, navigate to the “Developer”
tab in the left sidebar. This section contains options for configuring
MCP servers and other developer features.</span><span data-as="p">Click
the “Edit Config” button to open the configuration file:</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-developer.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=0fb595490a2f9e15c0301e771a57446c"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:1688 / 534"
data-path="images/quickstart-developer.png" decoding="async"
sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"
srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-developer.png?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=0a7e615ee50a27a4e514668f7cbd9f57 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-developer.png?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=16d6d4721219afd7e2bfa41f0795e7e0 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-developer.png?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=612b1de5516ed7321d5b6939b5b3c823 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-developer.png?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=840a428450dc0ec97538eb4e05050bcd 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-developer.png?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=59ae3a95918ff7f7b15e777c2d606496 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-developer.png?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=7838d7f023a281053786870336914f03 2500w"
data-optimize="true" width="1688" height="534"
alt="Developer settings showing Edit Config button" /></span></span>

</div>

<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-black/5 rounded-2xl dark:border-white/5">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">This action creates a new configuration file if one
doesn’t exist, or opens your existing configuration. The file is located
at:</span>

- **macOS**:
  `~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json`
- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json`

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

3

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Configure the Filesystem Server

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Replace the contents of the configuration file with
the following JSON structure. This configuration tells Claude Desktop to
start the Filesystem Server with access to specific directories:</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_lmildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_lmildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "filesystem": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": [
        "-y",
        "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem",
        "/Users/username/Desktop",
        "/Users/username/Downloads"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_lmildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_lmildinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Replace `username` with your actual computer username.
The paths listed in the `args` array specify which directories the
Filesystem Server can access. You can modify these paths or add
additional directories as needed.</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-green-200 bg-green-50 dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-600/20 [&_[data-component-part='callout-icon']]:mt-px"
callout-type="tip">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="text-green-800 dark:text-green-300 w-3.5 h-auto" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-green-800 dark:text-green-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">**Understanding the Configuration**</span>

- `"filesystem"`: A friendly name for the server that appears in Claude
  Desktop
- `"command": "npx"`: Uses Node.js’s npx tool to run the server
- `"-y"`: Automatically confirms the installation of the server package
- `"@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem"`: The package name of the
  Filesystem Server
- The remaining arguments: Directories the server is allowed to access

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&_[data-component-part='callout-icon']]:mt-px"
callout-type="warning">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">**Security
Consideration**</span><span data-as="p">Only grant access to directories
you’re comfortable with Claude reading and modifying. The server runs
with your user account permissions, so it can perform any file
operations you can perform manually.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-transparent bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-200 dark:from-white/10 via-80% to-transparent group-has-[[data-component-part="step-content"]:empty]/step:hidden"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

4

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Restart Claude Desktop

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">After saving the configuration file, completely quit
Claude Desktop and restart it. The application needs to restart to load
the new configuration and start the MCP
server.</span><span data-as="p">Upon successful restart, you’ll see an
MCP server indicator <img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ/images/claude-desktop-mcp-slider.svg?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ&amp;q=85&amp;s=f82a0459a6a233d9b15e63455af275b5"
style="display:inline;margin:0;height:1.3em" data-og-width="24"
data-og-height="24" data-path="images/claude-desktop-mcp-slider.svg"
data-optimize="true" data-opv="3"
srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ/images/claude-desktop-mcp-slider.svg?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ&amp;q=85&amp;s=4e92cf3d8a013aad98715d643fa53181 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ/images/claude-desktop-mcp-slider.svg?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ&amp;q=85&amp;s=cae6da0047b19e66c4aaebba241824a3 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ/images/claude-desktop-mcp-slider.svg?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ&amp;q=85&amp;s=0506f3e1da02b78fbcb1ac84e4f34396 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ/images/claude-desktop-mcp-slider.svg?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ&amp;q=85&amp;s=8c78b88705cad88c9da98a2e9d3355b6 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ/images/claude-desktop-mcp-slider.svg?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ&amp;q=85&amp;s=a59fe7c14097600740fb6e111dc62b34 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ/images/claude-desktop-mcp-slider.svg?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=2BMHnlNW5OqOohXZ&amp;q=85&amp;s=d5edb4b4c2781b1eebbdd23d386c601c 2500w"
width="24" height="24" /> in the bottom-right corner of the conversation
input box:</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-slider.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=f80a38b720fc0519079bae26e2aae312"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:1414 / 410"
data-path="images/quickstart-slider.png" decoding="async"

srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-slider.png?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=24a0dc6f30664e953cc185ed0c7abc64 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-slider.png?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=d670a5fd82405775d7bc1e5f20a9a847 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-slider.png?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=5f66fa4bcaaf50ca905415f15af2e276 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-slider.png?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=4aecd3c4b45c3aaac75a118d2d6edda5 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-slider.png?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=c7d321e2d25aa34552057a8866782549 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-slider.png?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=25dc1761b40b11ccb727b36183efa57f 2500w"

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Click on this indicator to view the available tools
provided by the Filesystem Server:</span>

<div>

style="text-align:center" data-name="frame">

<span data-as="p">If the server indicator doesn’t appear, refer to the

</div>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#using-the-filesystem-server"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Using the Filesystem Server</span>

<span data-as="p">With the Filesystem Server connected, Claude can now
interact with your file system. Try these example requests to explore
the capabilities:</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#file-management-examples"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">File Management Examples</span>

- **“Can you write a poem and save it to my desktop?”** - Claude will
  compose a poem and create a new text file on your desktop
- **“What work-related files are in my downloads folder?”** - Claude
  will scan your downloads and identify work-related documents
- **“Please organize all images on my desktop into a new folder called
  ‘Images’”** - Claude will create a folder and move image files into it

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#how-approval-works"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">How Approval Works</span>

<span data-as="p">Before executing any file system operation, Claude
will request your approval. This ensures you maintain control over all
actions:</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
style="text-align:center" data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-approve.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=98cc6e9dfe885fbd6e9bfae40601e494"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:962 / 464"
data-path="images/quickstart-approve.png" decoding="async"
sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"
srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-approve.png?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=d5ab1456f7728dcf93652b6542377ca3 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-approve.png?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=06809ba885f94726178efefed355395c 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-approve.png?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=a437dd1dd46c0d7cae1767f846eb100a 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-approve.png?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=d4323361de72398163de4500fd398cf3 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-approve.png?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=b7f5117fb238e9e7e455b58e1637cca1 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-approve.png?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=ab48fb927eaaf919c5ccf063a958bab6 2500w"
data-optimize="true" width="500"
alt="Claude requesting approval to perform a file operation" /></span></span>

</div>

<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-black/5 rounded-2xl dark:border-white/5">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Review each request carefully before approving. You
can always deny a request if you’re not comfortable with the proposed
action.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#troubleshooting"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Troubleshooting</span>

<span data-as="p">If you encounter issues setting up or using the
Filesystem Server, these solutions address common problems:</span>

<div class="accordion-group [&>details]:border-0 [&>details]:rounded-none [&>details>summary]:rounded-none [&>details]:mb-0 overflow-hidden mt-0 mb-3 rounded-xl prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert divide-y divide-inherit border dark:border-gray-800/50">

<div id="server-not-showing-up-in-claude-hammer-icon-missing"
class="absolute -top-[8rem]">

</div>

<div class="mr-0.5" component-part="accordion-caret-right">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="h-3 w-3 transition bg-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-400 duration-75" />

</div>

<div class="leading-tight text-left w-full" contenteditable="false"
component-part="accordion-title-container">

Server not showing up in Claude / hammer icon missing

</div>

<div id="server-not-showing-up-in-claude-hammer-icon-missing accordion children"
class="mt-2 mb-4 mx-6 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert overflow-x-auto cursor-default"
role="region"
aria-labelledby="server-not-showing-up-in-claude-hammer-icon-missing"
component-part="accordion-content">

1.  Restart Claude Desktop completely
2.  Check your `claude_desktop_config.json` file syntax
3.  Make sure the file paths included in `claude_desktop_config.json`
    are valid and that they are absolute and not relative
4.  Look at <a
    href="connect-local-servers.html#getting-logs-from-claude-for-desktop"
    class="link">logs</a> to see why the server is not connecting
5.  In your command line, try manually running the server (replacing
    `username` as you did in `claude_desktop_config.json`) to see if you
    get any errors:

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_52tldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_52tldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem /Users/username/Desktop /Users/username/Downloads
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_52tldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_52tldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="getting-logs-from-claude-desktop" class="absolute -top-[8rem]">

</div>

<div class="mr-0.5" component-part="accordion-caret-right">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="h-3 w-3 transition bg-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-400 duration-75" />

</div>

<div class="leading-tight text-left w-full" contenteditable="false"
component-part="accordion-title-container">

Getting logs from Claude Desktop

</div>

<div id="getting-logs-from-claude-desktop accordion children"
class="mt-2 mb-4 mx-6 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert overflow-x-auto cursor-default"
role="region" aria-labelledby="getting-logs-from-claude-desktop"
component-part="accordion-content">

<span data-as="p">Claude.app logging related to MCP is written to log
files in:</span>

- <span data-as="p">macOS: `~/Library/Logs/Claude`</span>
- <span data-as="p">Windows: `%APPDATA%\Claude\logs`</span>
- <span data-as="p">`mcp.log` will contain general logging about MCP
  connections and connection failures.</span>
- <span data-as="p">Files named `mcp-server-SERVERNAME.log` will contain
  error (stderr) logging from the named server.</span>

<span data-as="p">You can run the following command to list recent logs
and follow along with any new ones (on Windows, it will only show recent
logs):</span>

<div class="code-group p-0.5 mt-5 mb-8 flex flex-col not-prose relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 min-w-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:codeblock-dark text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light"
dir="ltr" orientation="horizontal">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 relative pr-2.5 *:first:*:ml-2.5"
component-part="code-group-tab-bar">

<div class="flex-1 w-0 text-xs leading-6 rounded-tl-xl gap-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" tabindex="-1"
orientation="horizontal" style="outline:none">

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

macOS/Linux

</div>

<div class="absolute -bottom-1.5 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light peer-empty/title:hidden">

</div>

<div class="peer/title flex items-center gap-1.5 px-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 group-hover:bg-gray-200/50 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700/70 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light">

Windows

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-end shrink-0 gap-1.5">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">

<div id="radix-_R_94tldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-0"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="active" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_94tldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-0"
tabindex="-1" style="animation-duration:0s">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-auto overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:100%;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre flex-none text-sm h-full leading-6"
component-part="code-group-tab-content">

``` shiki
tail -n 20 -f ~/Library/Logs/Claude/mcp*.log
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div id="radix-_R_94tldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-content-1"
class="w-full min-w-full max-w-full h-full max-h-full relative [&_[data-component-part=code-block-root]]:!rounded-xt"
state="inactive" orientation="horizontal" role="tabpanel"
aria-labelledby="radix-_R_94tldinpfcqcf9babsnpfdb_-trigger-1" hidden=""
tabindex="-1">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="tool-calls-failing-silently" class="absolute -top-[8rem]">

</div>

<div class="mr-0.5" component-part="accordion-caret-right">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="h-3 w-3 transition bg-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-400 duration-75" />

</div>

<div class="leading-tight text-left w-full" contenteditable="false"
component-part="accordion-title-container">

Tool calls failing silently

</div>

<div id="tool-calls-failing-silently accordion children"
class="mt-2 mb-4 mx-6 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert overflow-x-auto cursor-default"
role="region" aria-labelledby="tool-calls-failing-silently"
component-part="accordion-content">

<span data-as="p">If Claude attempts to use the tools but they
fail:</span>

1.  Check Claude’s logs for errors
2.  Verify your server builds and runs without errors
3.  Try restarting Claude Desktop

</div>

<div id="none-of-this-is-working-what-do-i-do"
class="absolute -top-[8rem]">

</div>

<div class="mr-0.5" component-part="accordion-caret-right">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="h-3 w-3 transition bg-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-400 duration-75" />

</div>

<div class="leading-tight text-left w-full" contenteditable="false"
component-part="accordion-title-container">

None of this is working. What do I do?

</div>

<div id="none-of-this-is-working-what-do-i-do accordion children"
class="mt-2 mb-4 mx-6 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert overflow-x-auto cursor-default"
role="region" aria-labelledby="none-of-this-is-working-what-do-i-do"
component-part="accordion-content">

<span data-as="p">Please refer to our
<a href="../tools/debugging.html" class="link">debugging guide</a> for
better debugging tools and more detailed guidance.</span>

</div>

<div id="enoent-error-and-appdata-in-paths-on-windows"
class="absolute -top-[8rem]">

</div>

<div class="mr-0.5" component-part="accordion-caret-right">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="h-3 w-3 transition bg-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-400 duration-75" />

</div>

<div class="leading-tight text-left w-full" contenteditable="false"
component-part="accordion-title-container">

ENOENT error and \`\${APPDATA}\` in paths on Windows

</div>

<div id="enoent-error-and-appdata-in-paths-on-windows accordion children"
class="mt-2 mb-4 mx-6 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert overflow-x-auto cursor-default"
role="region"
aria-labelledby="enoent-error-and-appdata-in-paths-on-windows"
component-part="accordion-content">

<span data-as="p">If your configured server fails to load, and you see
within its logs an error referring to `${APPDATA}` within a path, you
may need to add the expanded value of `%APPDATA%` to your `env` key in
`claude_desktop_config.json`:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="10" language="json">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "brave-search": {
    "command": "npx",
    "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-brave-search"],
    "env": {
      "APPDATA": "C:\\Users\\user\\AppData\\Roaming\\",
      "BRAVE_API_KEY": "..."
    }
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">With this change in place, launch Claude Desktop once
again.</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&_[data-component-part='callout-icon']]:mt-px"
callout-type="warning">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">**npm should be installed
globally**</span><span data-as="p">The `npx` command may continue to
fail if you have not installed npm globally. If npm is already installed
globally, you will find `%APPDATA%\npm` exists on your system. If not,
you can install npm globally by running the following command:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
npm install -g npm
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-local-servers.html#next-steps"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Next Steps</span>

<span data-as="p">Now that you’ve successfully connected Claude Desktop
to a local MCP server, explore these options to expand your
setup:</span>

<div class="columns prose dark:prose-invert grid max-w-none gap-4 sm:grid-cols-[repeat(var(--cols),minmax(0,1fr))] @2xl/columns-container:grid-cols-[repeat(var(--cols),minmax(0,1fr))] @[0px]/columns-container:grid-cols-1 columns card-group dark:prose-dark gap-y-0"
style="--cols:2">

<div class="card block font-normal group relative my-2 ring-2 ring-transparent rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-background-dark border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 overflow-hidden w-full cursor-pointer hover:!border-primary dark:hover:!border-primary-light"
tabindex="0" role="link">

<div class="px-6 py-5 relative" component-part="card-content-container">

<div id="card-link-arrow-icon"
class="absolute text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 group-hover:text-primary dark:group-hover:text-primary-light top-5 right-5 hidden">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="lucide lucide-arrow-up-right size-4" />

</div>

<div class="size-6 fill-gray-800 dark:fill-gray-100 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-100"
component-part="card-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-6 bg-primary dark:bg-primary-light !m-0 shrink-0" />

</div>

<div class="w-full">

## Explore other servers
